snap_eligibility.ai_procurement_notes: AI-specific procurement share not computable from PSC-level totals. Requires contract-level keyword search (award title/description) on USAspending.gov — not yet implemented. AI component set to 0 in sub_rate.
snap_eligibility.substitution_rate_methodology: sub_rate = contractor_decline_rate × 0.6 + 0 (AI component pending). contractor_decline_rate = max(0, -yoy_change_pct/100). Only applied when contractor spend is declining. Note: PSC categories are government-wide and broader than the specific workloads.
